description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and rich history of Atlanta, where the spirit of the South meets modern marvels. This 6-day adventure is perfect for couples looking to explore the city’s unique blend of history, shopping, and, of course, Marvel-themed attractions. From iconic landmarks to hidden gems, prepare for a journey filled with excitement and romance as you uncover the best of Atlanta.

days.title: Departure from Washington D.C. to Atlanta

activities.description: Dive into a classic Atlanta experience at The Varsity, famous for its chili dogs and burgers. This iconic fast-food joint is a must-visit for a quick and delicious meal.
Explore one of the largest aquariums in the world, home to thousands of marine animals. Don't miss the mesmerizing underwater tunnel and the dolphin show!
Stroll through this vibrant marketplace filled with local shops, eateries, and boutiques. It's a great spot to find unique Marvel merchandise and souvenirs.

activities.activity: Dinner at Mary Mac's Tea Room
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Southern meal at Mary Mac's, known for its warm hospitality and classic dishes like fried chicken and collard greens. A perfect way to end your first day in Atlanta!
Start your day with a hearty Southern breakfast at this beloved local spot. Their fluffy biscuits and creamy grits are a must-try!
Dive into the history of the iconic beverage at this interactive museum. Enjoy tastings from around the world and explore the fascinating exhibits.
Head to Ponce City Market for a variety of dining options. Enjoy a casual lunch at one of the many eateries, offering everything from tacos to gourmet sandwiches.
Stroll through this beautiful park, home to the iconic Fountain of Rings and various sculptures. It's a great spot to relax and take photos.

activities.activity: Shopping for Marvel Merchandise at The Marvel Store
activities.description: Visit The Marvel Store located in the heart of Atlanta to find exclusive Marvel merchandise and collectibles. Perfect for fans looking to add to their collection!
Enjoy a fun dining experience at The Vortex, known for its burgers and quirky atmosphere. A great place to unwind after a day of exploring!
End your day with a leisurely walk in Piedmont Park. Enjoy the beautiful skyline views and the peaceful atmosphere as the sun sets.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Flying Biscuit Cafe
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty Southern breakfast at this beloved local spot. Their fluffy biscuits and creamy grits are a must-try!

activities.activity: Martin Luther King Jr. National Historical Park
activities.description: Visit the birthplace of Martin Luther King Jr. and explore the rich history of the civil rights movement. The park includes his childhood home and the Ebenezer Baptist Church where he preached.
activities.searchQuery: Martin Luther King Jr. National Historical Park

activities.activity: Lunch at Mary Mac's Tea Room
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Southern lunch at this iconic restaurant. Don't miss their fried chicken and sweet tea, a true taste of Atlanta!
Dive into Atlanta's past at this comprehensive history center. Explore exhibits on the Civil War, Southern history, and the city's development, all set in beautiful gardens.
Head to Ponce City Market for a mix of shopping and dining. This historic building is filled with unique boutiques and local vendors, perfect for finding Marvel merchandise!
End your day with a seafood dinner at The Optimist, known for its fresh catches and vibrant atmosphere. Their oysters and lobster rolls are highly recommended!
Start your day with a delicious Southern-style breakfast at this local favorite. Their fluffy biscuits and creamy grits are a must-try!
Explore one of Atlanta's premier shopping destinations, Lenox Square. Here, you can find a variety of high-end stores and boutiques, perfect for picking up some Marvel merchandise!
Enjoy a casual lunch at The Cheesecake Factory, where you can choose from an extensive menu. Don't forget to save room for their famous cheesecake!

activities.activity: Marvel Store at The Battery Atlanta
activities.description: Head over to The Battery Atlanta to visit the Marvel Store. This is the perfect spot to find exclusive Marvel merchandise and collectibles!
After shopping, take some time to explore The Battery Atlanta. This vibrant area features entertainment, dining, and beautiful outdoor spaces to relax.

activities.activity: Dinner at Copeland's of New Orleans
activities.description: Savor a taste of New Orleans with a delightful dinner at Copeland's. Their Cajun and Creole dishes are sure to satisfy your cravings!

activities.activity: Catch a Movie at AMC Theatres
activities.description: End your day with a Marvel movie at AMC Theatres. Check the schedule for the latest releases and enjoy a cozy cinema experience!

days.title: A Day of Relaxation and Local Culture

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Flying Biscuit Cafe
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty Southern breakfast at this beloved local spot. Their famous biscuits and gravy are a must-try!

Stroll through Grant Park, one of Atlanta's oldest parks, featuring beautiful landscapes and the historic Oakland Cemetery. It's a perfect spot for a leisurely walk and some great photo opportunities.
Head over to Krog Street Market for lunch, where you can sample a variety of local foods from different vendors. It's a great place to enjoy the vibrant atmosphere and grab some unique bites.
After lunch, take some time to explore the shops at Krog Street Market. You'll find local artisans and unique boutiques, perfect for picking up Marvel-themed merchandise and other souvenirs.
Dive into the history of one of the world's most famous brands. The World of Coca-Cola offers interactive exhibits and tastings, making it a fun stop for couples.

activities.activity: Dinner at Mary Mac's Tea Room
activities.description: Enjoy a classic Southern dinner at Mary Mac's, known for its warm hospitality and traditional dishes. Don't miss their fried chicken and peach cobbler!
End your day with a romantic evening stroll at Piedmont Park. The park offers stunning views of the Atlanta skyline, especially at sunset.

transit.memo: Direct flight from Atlanta to Washington D.C.

Explore the history of the iconic beverage brand at this interactive museum. Don't miss the tasting room where you can sample drinks from around the world!

activities.activity: Transit to Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport
activities.description: Make your way to the airport for your flight back to Washington D.C.
